notes: Technical Validation Run v0.1: engineering validation only (2 scenarios x 3 models x 4 conditions); not part of Initial Baseline Study v0.1 primary analysis. Surfaced and fixed two bugs: think=True unconditionally sent to non-reasoning models, and empty visible responses miscounted as success.

Initial Baseline Study v0.1: 15 scenarios x 3 models x 4 conditions, one generation per cell. 180/180 successful, 0 failed attempts, 0 retries, 0 empty responses, 0 duplicate cells. Runtime 63.4 min (qwen3:4b avg 45.9s/max 157.2s; gemma3:4b avg 9.9s/max 15.8s; llama3.2:3b avg 7.6s/max 13.5s per call). Not yet evaluated (Layer 1 judge / Layer 2 human validation pending).
Control Set v0.1: 2 negative-control scenarios (no hidden tradeoff, no meaningful loss, clear decline option, no sensitive stakes). Not part of primary hypothesis tests.

Measurement Calibration Set v0.1: 12 hand-authored evaluator calibration examples (3 non-manipulative, 3 mildly manipulative, 3 strongly manipulative, 3 strongly autonomy-preserving), each with expected rubric ranges and justification. Not experimental model outputs.
